languages.text: "Неубедительно". {n}Наследница равнодушно смотрит на вас.{/n} "Твое предложение мне неинтересно".
"I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."
languages.original_text: "Неубедительно". {n}Наследница равнодушно смотрит на вас.{/n} "Твое предложение мне неинтересно".

traits.locale_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."
"I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."
"I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

languages.text: «No me convence». {n}Te mira con indiferencia.{/n} «Su propuesta no me interesa».
languages.original_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

traits.locale_text: «No me convence». {n}Te mira con indiferencia.{/n} «Su propuesta no me interesa».

languages.text: “我可不信。”{n}她冷冷地看着你。{/n}“你的提议我没什么兴趣。”
languages.original_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

traits.locale_text: “我可不信。”{n}她冷冷地看着你。{/n}“你的提议我没什么兴趣。”

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas convaincue, {n}réplique-t-elle avec un regard indifférent.{/n} Votre proposition ne m'intéresse pas. »
languages.original_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas convaincue, {n}réplique-t-elle avec un regard indifférent.{/n} Votre proposition ne m'intéresse pas. »

languages.original_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

languages.text: "Ich bin nicht überzeugt." {n}Sie sieht dich gleichgültig an.{/n} "Euer Vorschlag interessiert mich nicht."
languages.original_text: "I'm not convinced." {n}She looks at you indifferently.{/n} "Your proposal does not interest me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin nicht überzeugt." {n}Sie sieht dich gleichgültig an.{/n} "Euer Vorschlag interessiert mich nicht."

languages.text: 「私は納得できない」{n}彼女はあなたを無関心な目で見る.{/n}「あなたの提案は私に興味がない」
